_comment: Structured ingredients + nutrition for the Month-1 Coach recipes, so they work in the Plan board, shopping list (aisle-grouped, scaled), and Kroger send. Quantities transcribed from docs/T2D_Beginner_Edition.md. NUTRITION HONESTY: the source plan specifies only NET CARBS, so carb_g is set to the net-carb value (fiber_g 0) to display net carbs exactly; kcal/protein/fat are 0 (not invented) and nutrition_estimated is true. Keyed by coach recipe id.
